control_description: The board of directors and senior management demonstrate commitment to security through defined policies and oversight responsibilities
testing_method: Inspection of board minutes and security policy approvals

control_description: Roles and responsibilities for information security are formally defined and communicated across the organization
testing_method: Inspection of org chart and RACI documentation

control_description: Information security policies are documented approved and communicated to all personnel
testing_method: Inspection of policy acknowledgment records

control_description: Security objectives and responsibilities are communicated internally to support the functioning of internal controls
testing_method: Inspection of training completion records and internal communications

control_description: A formal risk assessment process identifies and evaluates risks to the achievement of security objectives
testing_method: Inspection of risk register and risk assessment documentation

control_description: Risks to the confidentiality availability and security of data are identified and analyzed on an ongoing basis
testing_method: Inspection of risk review meeting minutes and updated risk register

control_description: Controls are monitored on an ongoing basis to assess their continued effectiveness
testing_method: Inspection of monitoring reports and dashboards

control_description: Controls are selected and developed to mitigate identified risks to an acceptable level
testing_method: Inspection of control design documentation

control_description: Logical access to systems and data is restricted to authorized users through access control policies and MFA enforcement
testing_method: Inspection of access control configurations and MFA enforcement reports

control_description: User access is provisioned based on job role and deprovisioned promptly upon termination or role change
testing_method: Inspection of provisioning tickets and termination checklists

control_description: Periodic access reviews are conducted to validate that access rights remain appropriate
testing_method: Inspection of access review reports and sign-off documentation

control_description: Access to systems from external networks is controlled through VPN MFA and firewall rules
testing_method: Inspection of firewall rules and VPN configuration

control_description: Vulnerability scanning is performed regularly to identify security weaknesses
testing_method: Inspection of scan schedules and vulnerability reports

control_description: Security incidents are identified logged and responded to in accordance with the incident response plan
testing_method: Inspection of incident log and IRP activation records

control_description: A documented incident response plan defines roles responsibilities and procedures for responding to security events
testing_method: Inspection of IRP document and tabletop exercise records

control_description: Procedures exist to recover systems and data following a security incident
testing_method: Inspection of recovery procedures and post-incident reviews

control_description: Changes to systems and infrastructure follow a formal change management process including testing and approval
testing_method: Inspection of change tickets and CAB approval records

control_description: Third-party vendors with access to systems or data are assessed for security risk prior to engagement and annually thereafter
testing_method: Inspection of vendor risk assessments and contract security requirements

control_description: System availability is monitored against defined SLAs and performance thresholds with alerting on breach
testing_method: Inspection of monitoring dashboards uptime reports and SLA documentation

control_description: Processes exist to identify and resolve availability incidents and minimize their recurrence
testing_method: Inspection of incident tickets SLA reports and post-mortem documentation

control_description: Data is backed up regularly and recovery procedures are tested to validate recoverability within defined RTO/RPO targets
testing_method: Inspection of backup logs recovery test results and RTO/RPO documentation

control_description: A data classification policy defines categories of confidential data and handling requirements for each
testing_method: Inspection of data classification policy and data inventory

control_description: Confidential data is encrypted at rest and in transit using approved encryption standards
testing_method: Inspection of encryption configurations and key management documentation

control_description: Access to confidential data is restricted to authorized personnel on a need-to-know basis
testing_method: Inspection of access control lists and data access logs

control_description: Confidential data is disposed of securely in accordance with the data retention policy when no longer required
testing_method: Inspection of data disposal records and retention policy

control_description: Personnel and third parties with access to confidential information are required to sign confidentiality agreements
testing_method: Inspection of signed NDA records and third-party agreement log
